title: Byrsopteris speciosa

The genus Byrsopteris is part of the group Polypodiophyta, which includes all ferns. Byrsopteris speciosa is an extinct species that can be found in fossil records from Europe and other parts of the world. This fern is an important part of the fossil record, providing insights into the evolution of plant life during the Carboniferous period.
